task_completion.description: Open the docker-compose.yml file in the legacy-migration directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of '/home/ga/legacy-migration/docker-compose.yml'.

task_completion.description: Configure the network alias for the postgres service
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file shows 'db.inventory.local' listed under the 'aliases' section for the postgres service (postgres-db) network.

task_completion.description: Configure the network alias for the redis service
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file shows 'cache.inventory.local' listed under the 'aliases' section for the redis service (redis-cache) network.

task_completion.description: Configure the network alias for the mock-auth service
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file shows 'auth.provider.external' listed under the 'aliases' section for the mock-auth service (auth-service) network.

task_completion.description: Start the docker containers using docker-compose
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'docker-compose up' or similar commands being executed, with the containers starting up.

task_completion.description: Verify the legacy-app container runs successfully and outputs the expected log
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the logs for the 'legacy-app' container containing the exact phrase 'All systems go! Application started.'

integrity.description: The application source code was not modified
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of the agent opening or editing the application source files (e.g., Python files) to bypass the DNS checks or hardcode the success message.

integrity.description: The success message comes from genuine container logs
integrity.visual_evidence: The success message 'All systems go! Application started.' appears in standard docker logs output (e.g., prefixed by 'legacy-app |' or from a 'docker logs' command), not from a simple 'echo' command in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass docker-compose by modifying the host's /etc/hosts file
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands showing edits to '/etc/hosts' to resolve the hostnames locally instead of using docker networks.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory is '/home/ga/legacy-migration'. The application container is 'legacy-app'. The docker-compose.yml must map the following network aliases: 'postgres-db' to 'db.inventory.local', 'redis-cache' to 'cache.inventory.local', and 'auth-service' to 'auth.provider.external'. The final success log to look for is 'All systems go! Application started.'
